category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Apache Gravitino as a high-performance, geo-distributed, federated metadata lake.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at source_facts.homepage is the Apache Gravitino project site.
docs_sources: Official Apache Gravitino website provides a dedicated documentation path.
